title: An Optimization Algorithm for VMI Test Evaluation
venue: 2019 IEEE 9th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC), Las Vegas, NV, USA
excerpt: This paper presents an optimization algorithm for VMI test evaluation, addressing psychometric test simulation using image processing techniques.
citation: C. Liambas and S. Perrakis, "An Optimization Algorithm for VMI Test Evaluation," 2019 IEEE 9th Annual Computing and Communication Workshop and Conference (CCWC), Las Vegas, NV, USA, 2019, pp. 0013-0018, doi: 10.1109/CCWC.2019.8666591.
